# launchd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `launchd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `launchd.agents` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Definition of per-user launchd agents. |
| `launchd.daemons` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Definition of launchd daemons. |
| `launchd.envVariables` | `attribute set of (string or list of string)` | A set of environment variables to be set on all future processes launched by launchd in the caller’s context. The value of each variable can be either a string or a list of strings. The latter is concatenated, interspersed with colon characters. |
| `launchd.labelPrefix` | `string` | The default prefix of the service label. Individual services can override this by setting the Label attribute. |
| `launchd.user.agents` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Definition of per-user launchd agents. |
| `launchd.user.envVariables` | `attribute set of (string or list of string)` | A set of environment variables to be set on all future processes launched by launchd in the caller’s context. The value of each variable can be either a string or a list of strings. The latter is concatenated, interspersed with colon characters. |
